seo.title: HeartLink | Private Matchmaking
seo.description: Private matchmaking for select Indian families in India and across the world.
seo.ogDescription: Founder-led matchmaking for select Indian families, with privacy, trust and family-first review.

hero.title: Private matchmaking for select Indian families.
hero.description: Led personally by Gopi Shah, HeartLink helps families find suitable life partners through trusted networks, careful review and complete privacy.
assurances: 50 Premium Search mandates at a time
hero.note: Led personally by Gopi Shah · 50 Premium Search mandates at a time · No public profiles
hero.privacyNote: Identity is shared only with approval.

legacy.title: Marriage is a family decision. We treat it with that respect.
legacy.lead: Families come to HeartLink when a match needs judgment, privacy and personal attention.
paragraphs: We look beyond biodata to understand family background, education, values, lifestyle and long-term compatibility. Every introduction is private and shared only when there is genuine interest.

audience.title:
Families feel secure.
Children feel understood.
audience.description: Parents want trust, background and seriousness. Candidates want compatibility, comfort and privacy. HeartLink gives importance to both.

cards.label: For parents & families
cards.title: Strong family understanding.
cards.description: We understand family values, reputation, education, profession and social background before suggesting any introduction.

cards.label: For sons & daughters
cards.title: Modern compatibility. No app culture.
cards.description: We understand personality, goals and expectations. Introductions are limited, private and shared only after careful thought.

registry.title: Apply free. Stay private. Be considered for suitable families.
registry.lead: The Registry Network helps HeartLink understand good families even before a paid mandate begins.
paragraphs: Your details are never made public. If there is a suitable family or Premium Search client, HeartLink may reach out privately before sharing anything further.

privacy.title: Your family details stay strictly private.
privacy.description: There is no public database, no browsing and no sharing of personal details without approval.

cards.title: No public profiles
cards.description: Profiles are not shown online or made searchable.

cards.title: Consent before sharing
cards.description: Details are shared only after both sides show interest.

cards.title: Human verification
cards.description: We use conversations, references and direct checks, not only forms.

cards.title: Gopi Shah reviews
cards.description: Important introductions are personally reviewed before moving ahead.

proofHeading.title: Proof that can be seen, not just promised.
proofHeading.description: Selected public credibility signals from Gopi Shah's community, cultural and matrimonial work.

proofAssets.label: Award recognition
proofAssets.title: Dr. Sarojini Naidu International Award
proofAssets.description: Recognition connected to Gopi Shah's contribution to education, culture and community service.

proofAssets.label: Founder-led practice
proofAssets.title: Five years of honorary matrimonial service
proofAssets.description: Before HeartLink, Gopi Shah ran Jeevansathi as an honorary matrimonial service, shaping this private family-first approach.

proofAssets.label: Cultural credibility
proofAssets.title: Community work across India and the United States
proofAssets.description: Gopi Shah's broader cultural and community work informs the discretion and judgment HeartLink brings to families.

process.title:
Simple steps.
Careful introductions.
process.description: From the first call to the final decision, the process stays private, personal and clear.

steps.label: Private meeting
steps.title: We understand your family.
steps.description: We speak with you privately and understand the person, family background and expectations.

steps.label: Profile review
steps.title: We prepare a clear picture.
steps.description: We understand education, work, personality, values and family details.

steps.label: Selected introductions
steps.title: Only suitable options are shared.
steps.description: We do not send random profiles. Each introduction is reviewed and shared privately.

steps.label: Guidance
steps.title: We support the conversation.
steps.description: We help both sides move ahead with clarity, comfort and respect.

steps.label: Family support
steps.title: We stay involved when needed.
steps.description: HeartLink can support family discussions, pre-marriage conversations and early adjustment.

storiesHeading.title: Quiet success stories, shared with care.
storiesHeading.description: Anonymized examples of the types of families HeartLink is built to serve.

stories.label: Private family search
stories.quote: A Mumbai family wanted a serious route without public browsing. HeartLink kept the process private, reviewed background carefully and shared only selected introductions.

stories.label: Global Indian family
stories.quote: For an overseas Indian family, the priority was cultural comfort and discretion. HeartLink helped translate expectations between generations before any introduction moved forward.
stories.source: Anonymized family example · Global Indian family

stories.label: Candidate comfort
stories.quote: A candidate who did not want app culture was able to share preferences privately while the family still received the seriousness and verification they expected.

founder.imageAlt: Gopi Shah, Founder and Principal Advisor of HeartLink
founder.quote: A good match is not only about two people. It is also about two families feeling comfortable.
founder.description: Gopi Shah personally guides HeartLink's matchmaking work. Her network, experience and family-first approach help clients feel safe and well looked after.

finalCta.title:
Looking for a serious match?
Start with a private conversation.
finalCta.description: Tell us about your family and the person seeking a match. Every enquiry is reviewed privately.
finalCta.note: By appointment only · All enquiries remain confidential
